name: Thesis Gold Inc.
description: Thesis Gold and Silver Inc. is a resource precious metals development company focused on unlocking the potential of its 100% owned Lawyers-Ranch Project, a gold/silver development property with material silver leverage located in the prolific and re-emerging Toodoggone Mining District, in north-central British Columbia. The company is dedicated to responsible exploration and resource development, building its operations on a foundation of environmental stewardship, social responsibility, and strong corporate governance to deliver long-term value for its shareholders and stakeholders.
